recommendations.title: Against the Ice
recommendations.overview: In 1909, two explorers fight to survive after they're left behind while on a Danish expedition in ice-covered Greenland.

recommendations.title: Jungle Run
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister's journey into the jungle to find their missing father.

recommendations.title: Jurassic Galaxy
recommendations.overview: In the near future, a ship of space explorers crash land on an unknown planet. They're soon met with some of their worst fears as they discover the planet is inhabited by monstrous dinosaurs.

recommendations.title: The Lost World
recommendations.overview: Professor Challenger leads an expedition of scientists and adventurers to a remote plateau deep in the Amazonian jungle to verify his claim that dinosaurs still live there.

recommendations.title: Congo
recommendations.overview: Eight people embark on an expedition into the Congo, a mysterious expanse of unexplored Africa, where human greed and the laws of nature have gone berserk.

recommendations.title: Primitive War
recommendations.overview: During the Vietnam War, a recon unit ventures to an isolated jungle valley to uncover the fate of a missing platoon. They soon find themselves in a fight for their lives against an unexpected enemy — prehistoric dinosaurs.

recommendations.title: Slave of the Cannibal God
recommendations.overview: A woman and her brother fly to New Guinea to look for a lost expedition, led by her husband, which has vanished in the great jungle.

recommendations.title: Tarzan and His Mate
recommendations.overview: Harry Holt returns to Africa with his friend Martin Arlington to head up a large ivory expedition.

recommendations.title: Kong: Skull Island
recommendations.overview: Explore the mysterious and dangerous home of the king of the apes as a team of explorers ventures deep inside the treacherous, primordial island.

recommendations.title: Predator
recommendations.overview: A team of elite commandos on a secret mission in a Central American jungle come to find themselves hunted by an extraterrestrial warrior.
